text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while, Trainer! I've been lonely without
you!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Duh! I had a ton of fun playing during my time
off, but...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sometimes, I'd realize that you weren't there...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So! I'm going to stick with you like glue to make
up for all the lost time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It looks like Maya got plenty of rest over her break. In fact, she's almost too lively.
